payload.author: claude
payload.body: Epic status after the board-completion session: every child done except RT-58 (crates.io publish) — runbook in the ticket, blocked solely on bri's token and launch timing. PR #1 carries the entire body of work with CI green (https://github.com/briannadoubt/Trust/pull/1). Merge + publish are the two remaining human actions for v0.1.
